title: When Thunder Knocks Twice
synopsis: A small robot discovers a mysterious door on a storm-swept beach and learns about caring for unexpected visitors through a series of hilarious mishaps.

pages.text: Thunder crashes twice on the pebble beach. Bolt rolls forward on squeaky treads. Gray clouds pile up like mashed potatoes. Salt spray tickles his chrome-blue body. A wooden door stands between two rocks. The door has never been there before. Ever. Bolt's pixel eyes blink three times fast. The door has a brass knocker shaped like a fish. Waves splash against the pebbles with a rattle-crash sound. Wind whistles through Bolt's joints. The small robot reaches out one stubby arm. His wheel gets stuck in seaweed. He tumbles sideways. Pebbles scatter everywhere. The door stays perfectly still. Lightning flashes purple-white. Rain starts to patter on Bolt's round head.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels discovers a mysterious wooden door standing between rocks on a pebble beach as storm clouds gather. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Bolt finding the mysterious door on the beach

pages.text: Bolt untangles himself from the seaweed. His treads spin uselessly in the air. More seaweed wraps around his arms. He beeps three times for help. Nobody answers. Just thunder. The brass fish knocker seems to wink at him. Or maybe that was lightning. Bolt finally rights himself with a metallic clang. His screen-face shows question marks. The door is taller than three Bolts stacked up. It smells like old wood and mystery. Rain drops make tiny ping sounds on his chrome surface. The storm is getting closer. Much closer.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels tangled in seaweed on a pebble beach, with question marks on his screen-face as rain begins to fall. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Bolt tangled in seaweed looking confused

chapters.title: Day Two: The Problem Gets Bigger

pages.text: The rain pounds harder today. Bolt brings an umbrella to the beach. The wind steals it immediately. It flips inside-out three times. Then it flies away like a confused bat. Bolt's treads slip on wet pebbles. He slides toward the waves. His arms windmill frantically. The door is still there. Now it's slightly open. A tiny nose pokes out. Then whiskers. Then green eyes. A wet kitten mews pitifully. Bolt's circuits fizz with worry. The kitten needs help. But every time Bolt moves closer, he slips. His treads have no grip on wet rocks.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels slipping on wet pebbles as his umbrella flies away, while a tiny wet kitten peeks out from the mysterious door. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Bolt slipping in rain while kitten appears

pages.text: Bolt tries to reach the kitten. He slips backward. Forward. Sideways. His treads spin like egg beaters. The kitten mews louder. It's cold and scared. Bolt's screen shows a sad face. He must help somehow. But physics is not cooperating. At all. The storm grows angrier. Waves crash higher up the beach. Soon the door might be underwater. The kitten shivers behind the wooden frame. Bolt calculates seventeen different rescue plans. They all end with him sliding into the ocean.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels spinning helplessly on slippery pebbles while a shivering kitten watches from the doorway as waves crash nearby. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Bolt's treads spinning uselessly while kitten shivers

pages.text: Today Bolt brings his tool kit. And rope. And rubber boots. The boots don't fit his treads. Obviously. He ties the rope around his middle. The other end goes around a big rock. Safety first. Bolt inches toward the door. The kitten is still there. Hungrier now. The small robot opens his chest compartment. Inside: emergency cat treats. He slides forward one pebble at a time. The rope pulls tight. Perfect. He reaches the door without falling. The kitten purrs and eats three treats. Success tastes like saltwater and accomplishment.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels carefully approaching the door with a rope tied around his waist, offering cat treats to a grateful kitten. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Bolt safely reaching the kitten with treats

pages.text: The kitten follows Bolt home. Slowly. Carefully. The rope helps them both stay steady. At home, Bolt sets up a cozy bed. Food bowls. A litter box. The kitten purrs like a tiny motor. Outside, the storm finally moves on. Sunlight breaks through the clouds. Tomorrow Bolt will check the beach again. The door might bring more surprises. But now he knows how to help. He has rope. And treats. And a very happy kitten who thinks robots make excellent friends.

illustration.description: A small friendly robot with a round chrome-blue body, glowing cyan screen-face with pixel eyes, stubby jointed arms, and tread-wheels setting up a cozy home with food bowls and a bed while a happy kitten purrs nearby as sunlight streams through windows. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Bolt caring for the kitten in their cozy home

coverPrompt.alt: Robot on stormy beach with mysterious door

questions.question: What does Bolt find on the beach?
questions.explanation: Bolt discovers a mysterious wooden door that appeared between two rocks on the pebble beach.

questions.question: Why does Bolt keep slipping on day two?
questions.explanation: The rain makes the pebbles wet and slippery, so Bolt's treads can't get a good grip.

questions.question: What comes out of the door?
questions.explanation: A wet, scared kitten peeks out from behind the mysterious door and needs Bolt's help.

questions.question: How does Bolt finally help the kitten safely?
choices: He waits for the rain to stop
questions.explanation: Bolt ties a rope around himself and anchors it to a rock so he can reach the kitten without slipping.
